texto: It occurred to me that if I could invent a machine - a gun - which could by its rapidity of fire, enable one man to do as much battle duty as a hundred, that it would, to a large extent supersede the necessity of large armies, and consequently, exposure to battle and disease [would] be greatly diminished.
explicacao: Citação de Richard Jordan Gatling sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It occurred to me that if I could invent a machine - a gun - which could by its rapidity of fire,…” articula reflexao, army, battle em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como battle e gatling-gun.
